overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game (Starfield) showing a player character in a spacesuit exploring a warmly lit indoor reception lobby with red curtains, wooden furniture, and retro-futuristic decor. The character walks around the space, examining the reception desk and a wall sign for Akila City.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi hotel reception lobby with wooden desk

agents.ego_description: walking toward the reception desk while observing the lobby interior

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting behind the reception desk working at a computer terminal

entered.detail: large wooden reception desk with computer terminals and storage cabinets
tall red curtains covering the wall behind the seating area
brown leather couch with white pillows positioned against the curtained wall
bright square illuminated wall fixture providing warm ambient light
large potted fern plant placed next to the leather sofa
gold posts with red velvet ropes creating a queue line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a warmly lit indoor lobby with the camera following a spacesuited character approaching a wooden reception desk. An NPC sits behind the desk working at a terminal. The room features red velvet curtains, a brown leather sofa, and gold stanchions with red ropes. The character walks forward, taking in the retro-futuristic decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: lobby corner with city sign and hallway entrance

events.description: character turns right to face the Akila City sign and adjacent hallway

agents.ego_description: turning to examine the Akila City sign and the hallway leading deeper into the building

entered.detail: large illuminated wall sign reading AKILA CITY with additional text below
open doorway leading to a corridor with warm lighting in the distance
small wooden stand with a book or menu display near the sign

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to face a wall displaying a large AKILA CITY sign, revealing a hallway entrance leading deeper into the facility. The red curtains that were on the right are now visible to the left as the camera pans. A wooden podium stands near the sign, and the stanchion barriers shift to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: lobby entrance area near exit door

events.description: character turns left to face back toward the reception desk and entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left to face the reception area again while moving toward the lobby entrance

entered.detail: metal doorway with horizontal slats marking the exit to the lobby

segments.scene_description: The character turns left, bringing the reception desk back into view while revealing the entrance door at the far end of the room. The Akila City sign and hallway exit the frame as the camera completes its survey of the lobby. The red curtains return to the right side of the frame, and the character faces the original direction from the start of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a warmly lit, retro-futuristic lobby as a spacesuited character surveys the reception area. It begins with the camera following the character toward a wooden reception desk where an NPC works at a terminal, surrounded by red velvet curtains and gold stanchions. As the character turns right, the perspective shifts to reveal a large Akila City sign and a hallway entrance, causing the red curtains and stanchion barriers to slide across the frame to the left. The scene then pivots back to the left, bringing the reception desk back into view while uncovering an entrance door at the far end of the room. Finally, the Akila City sign exits the frame as the camera completes its rotation, returning the red curtains to the right and facing the character back toward the original direction.
